review_text:
I am giving 5 stars as our experience was exceptional. They were extremely helpful and made every effort to accommodate changes to our itinerary. The cabin was very clean, the landscape well kept and the park was quiet.

Thank you for a great experience!!

Great value, excellent cabin and facilities.
Definitely be back again.

Double deluxe cabin was fantastic! Super spacious. Incredibly comfortable beds. So great having a washing machine and dryer and oven in the cabin! Spoilt. Thank you for having us ☺️ Pool table and table tennis an added bonus 🤠
It was an amazing getaway relaxing place to be, my family had lots of fun and the games room was a blast!!
Very noisy in wall air-conditioning. Woke us up every time it started up. Studio needs tarting up.
Great place, good location not too far from the centre of town and friendly staff

Difficult to recommend the cabins here. Whilst everything is clean and tidy, the spaces are so small that it renders them barely functional. Potentially enough for one person but 2 is a very tight fit. We had to remove a small table and chairs outside because it was impossible to get into the main room otherwise. If you have luggage, there is no room to lay it out. The light switches are difficult to find and we couldn't find the external light switch...which resulted in a fall on the stairs after dark. Cabins are also in close proximity to neighbours and their barking dogs.

We had a wonderful weekend at Mudgee Valley Park. The staff couldn't be more helpful with our accommodation needs which changed several time before arrival. The 4 bedroom cabins are amazing lots of room for every body and a well appointed kitchen. Two bathrooms with a separate toilet was very handy for larger groups. Camp kitchen is well equipped and a billiard table for the teenagers to gather around was an added bonus. Probably a little far to walk with groceries from the major supermarkets. This also made for a very quiet park. You can call any of the local pubs for the courtesy bus if needed. Mudgee Valley Park will be top of our list for accommodation when next out that way.

I had to book 2 cabins to accommodate myself, my husband & my son. Upon booking these were confirmed to be next to each other, however, upon arrival they couldnt have been at more opposite ends of the park. Shorter office hours meant no one cared to rectify this issue. Very disappointing to arrive to this.

Excellent stay! Very happy!!! Spacious spot to pop up a tent. Power to site. Hot hot water in the shower. Clean toilets/bathroom. Fantastic kitchen amenities and games room. Conveniently located to everything you could need in town. Well lit. Felt safe. Great value for money! Will stay again!

We thought we were booking one of the larger, newer cabins but ended up in a very disappointing, very tired old cabin.  We were prepared to make the most of it, but found that despite paying extra for 4 adults, only 1 bed was made up and we had to make the other ourselves.  Ironic that they threaten to fine guests $200 if they don't empty the bins, but they don't even bother to make up the bed for all the guests.
Some maintenance issues in the cabin (rotting floor in the bathroom, 1 element on the 2-element stove top not working).
When we left in the morning, we dropped the keys into the return box right next to 2 staff who were standing talking, and who completely ignored us, not a great experience.
Mudgee however was a great place to visit!

Had a caravan site. Well grassed and very close to level. The staff were awesome. Amenities very clean. Only one thing I would suggest,and that is a hotplate of some kind in the camp kitchen.
Will definitely stay here again.

We were very lucky as the park was not busy at all. The reception staff are wonderful.
The park has had a lot of renovations with their cabins - they look excellent.
We had a great powered site  for the van near the amenities which are spotless. Shower cubicles are generous which is such a nice change compared to other parks!
It is about a twenty minute walk to the shopping, pubs and restaurants so if you don’t mind the stroll - it is perfect.
We had a fantastic stay and will definitely stay here again :)
Very clean, comfortable and affordable
Excellent place to stay in Mudgee
The cabins were great. They were well laid out, spacious, with new equipment. The air-conditioning was great.
Couldn't recommend this place more the cabin spectacular

A clean and comfortable room in a neat area. Equipped with a cooking stove if you prefer to prepare your own meals. Please note: no internet available. Just a 5-minute drive to the nearest grocery store.

The older cabin we stayed in was clean & comfortable but a little tired. The bunks beds were not made up due to their tight confines against the wall in the second bedroom & were next to impossible to make.
Clean, tidy & Erin was lovely to deal with!
Best carvan park in mudgee Margaret berg Charlie beagle stayed there coming back 🙏

Excellent place to stay. Cabin was clean and comfortable. Kitchen facilities were basic but more than needed. Well equipped camp kitchen/ games area. Park itself is very well maintained. Friendly office staff. Nothing for us to complain about.
舒适

This park was great when we arrived and met by friendly staff, that's where it ended. Tree stumps removals with roots still pretruding our site uneven, grass not mowed or cleaned. Not good for people with stability issues.
Amenities where clean Weekdays but nothing on weekends.
Kids riding on electric scooters no helmets. Permanents/Others  not adhering to speed limit.
No management supervision.

Nice clean park with lovely helpful staff. |Bathrooms clean & tidy & good showers. |Well priced as well! Good place to stay even though it’s 1.5klms out of town, it is on the town bike trail which is well worth a look.|The staff also helped organise the courtesy bus from Kelly’s Irish Pub for dinner one night.

Great service, Donna was very helpful.

Thanks Mudgee valley park team
Beautiful rooms super friendly the staff was

This park is a little bit away from CBD, but is an easy flat walk from Caravan park. The amenities were nice and clean. There is a very great camp kitchen with ping pong table, billiards table, tv etc. We used it a lot.
Sites were grassed and staff were friendly. Caravan park is a bit noisy being near main road and having building work done.
Nice place. Modern and very clean

Room looked clean and had good towels and linen but the door lock was damaged and hard to use. Unfortunately there were cockroaches in the room and after the first night I found 2 squashed ones in the bed where i had slept. I have slept in much worse places so didn't bother me much but others might not be happy at all. My wife would have freaked out if she had been here.

Great place to stay clean and tidy with good facilities,great service and affordable. Staff were excellent and friendly, very helpful nothing was a problem. We will definitely be going back. Highly recommend staying here. Happy all round. The kids loved it. We had a powered site every thing we needed they had. We had 5 adults and 3 children. Thank you  Mudgee Valley Park for a Great Stay
Excellent place to stay very happy and will stay again 💯👌👌👌👌👍👍👍👍
I would highly recommend this Park. We were very well looked after and the cabin was everything we needed. Office staff friendly and very helpful.m
Very spacious two bedrooms cabin, with a laundry, a bathroom, a lounge and a kitchen
Nice caravan park, large sites,close to the main highway,reception lady full of smiles ,very helpful and friendly
Staff is very helpful and friendly
Nice tidy park, quiet and not too far out of town

Wow. Only in Australia where you pay $150 for something marginally better than a tent.

Holiday quite ruined by this to be honest. Constant road noise making it really hard to sleep. It’s a worker site too so people leave early in the morning. No insulation, can literally hear people next door peeing. Just bad
Fantastic park I'm Mudgee

Great place to stay, so peacefully quiet and just 3 mins from town centre. Accommodation soooooo clean! Games room was fantastic, pool table, table tennis, air hockey and a variety of movies as well as all brand new outdoor furniture...again perfectly clean.

Great value for money park. There for business so don't know about facilities for kids, but a small pool available. The cabin was spacious and warm (july) and well equipped.
Missing a curtain and bedside lights but I suspect we were in "overflow" accommodation meant for summer managers.
Park feels quite secure, and after hours checkin was very easy.
Thanks

Mudgee Valley Park was not our first choice being a little further out of the centre than we wanted, but it was fine. The Park was well occupied and the sites were under renovation. They will be well grassed for summer. Amenities were clean and functional, although with temperatures dropping to below zero overnight, the windows could have been closed! We worried about proximity to the highway, but it was not a problem.
